CGAL::Conforming_constrained_Delaunay_tr.name: CGAL::Conforming_constrained_Delaunay_triangulation_3
CGAL::Conforming_constrained_Delaunay_tr.brief: This class template represents a 3D conforming constrained Delaunay triangulation.
CGAL::Conforming_constrained_Delaunay_tr.detailed: It contains a data member of type Tr and provides additional functionality for handling polygonal constraints during the triangulation process. Traits is the geometric traits class and must be a model of ConformingConstrainedDelaunayTriangulationTraits_3 . Tr is the underlying triangulation class. It must be CGAL::Default or an instance of the CGAL::Triangulation_3 class template with the same Traits template parameter. Its Vertex type must be a model of ConformingConstrainedDelaunayTriangulationVertexBase_3 , and its Cell type must be a model of ConformingConstrainedDelaunayTriangulationCellBase_3 . The default value is Triangulation_3<Traits, TDS> where TDS is Triangulation_data_structure_3< Conforming_constrained_Delaunay_triangulation_vertex_base_3 <Traits>, Conforming_constrained_Delaunay_triangulation_cell_base_3 <Traits>> .

members.name: Conforming_constrained_Delaunay_triangulation_3
members.brief: Default constructor.
members.detailed: This constructor initializes an empty Conforming_constrained_Delaunay_triangulation_3 object.

members.name: Conforming_constrained_Delaunay_triangulation_3
members.brief: creates a 3D constrained Delaunay triangulation conforming to the faces of a polygon mesh, following the same API and requirements as the function template make_conforming_constrained_Delaunay_triangulation_3() .

members.name: Conforming_constrained_Delaunay_triangulation_3
members.brief: creates a 3D constrained Delaunay triangulation conforming to the faces of a polygon soup, following the same API and requirements as the function template make_conforming_constrained_Delaunay_triangulation_3() .

members.name: triangulation
members.brief: returns a const reference to the underlying triangulation.
members.detailed: This allows the use of all non-modifying functions of the base triangulation. See the other overload for a way to move the triangulation out of this object and then modify it. Example usage: std::cout << "Number of vertices in the CDT: " << ccdt.triangulation().number_of_vertices() << '\n' ;

members.name: triangulation
members.brief: moves and returns the underlying triangulation, then clears the object.
members.detailed: This function allows the underlying triangulation to be moved out of this object. Example usage: auto tr = std::move(ccdt).triangulation(); // Now `tr` is a valid `CGAL::Triangulation_3` object that can be used for further processing. // and the triangulation of `ccdt` is empty. std::cout << "Number of vertices in the triangulation `tr`: " << tr.number_of_vertices() << '\n' ; std::cout << "Number of vertices in `ccdt`: " << ccdt.triangulation().number_of_vertices() << '\n' ; assert(ccdt.triangulation().number_of_vertices() == 0); After calling this function, ccdt will be empty and tr will be move-constructed from the underlying triangulation, avoiding any copy. This function is available only when the object is an rvalue. After this function is called, the object is in a state equivalent to that of a default-constructed object.

members.name: is_facet_constrained
members.brief: returns whether a facet is constrained or not.
members.detailed: f is a facet of the triangulation, of type Triangulation::Facet , as defined by its triangulation data structure.

members.name: is_facet_constrained
members.brief: same as is_facet_constrained(f) with f being Triangulation::Facet(ch, index) .

members.name: face_constraint_index
members.brief: same as face_constraint_index(f) with f being Triangulation::Facet(ch, index) .

members.name: face_constraint_index
members.brief: returns the index of the constraint that constrains the facet f

members.name: number_of_constrained_facets
members.brief: returns the number of constrained facets in the triangulation.

members.name: constrained_facets_begin
members.brief: returns an iterator to the start of the sequence of constrained facets.
members.detailed: This function provides an iterator to the first facet that is constrained within the triangulation. The sequence of constrained facets is in an arbitrary order.

members.name: constrained_facets_end
members.brief: returns the past-the-end iterator of the sequence of constrained facets.

members.name: constrained_facets
members.brief: returns a range of the constrained facets.

members.name: Triangulation
members.brief: The internal triangulation type.
members.return_type: typename CGAL::Default::Get< Tr, Triangulation_3< Traits, Triangulation_data_structure_3< Conforming_constrained_Delaunay_triangulation_vertex_base_3 < Traits >, Conforming_constrained_Delaunay_triangulation_cell_base_3 < Traits > > > >::type

members.name: Constrained_facets_iterator
members.brief: A bidirectional iterator for visiting all constrained facets of the triangulation.
members.detailed: The value type of this iterator is Triangulation::Facet .

members.name: Constrained_facets_range
members.brief: defines a range type for iterating over the constrained facets.
members.detailed: This type is used to iterate through all facets that are constrained. Its iterator type is Constrained_facets_iterator .

members.name: debug
members.brief: Access debug options.
members.detailed: Returns a reference to the debug options object that controls various debugging and algorithmic behaviors. Use this to configure debug flags: ccdt.debug().Steiner_points( true ); ccdt.debug().input_faces( true );

CGAL::Conforming_constrained_Delaunay_tr.name: CGAL::Conforming_constrained_Delaunay_triangulation_cell_base_3
CGAL::Conforming_constrained_Delaunay_tr.brief: Cell base class for the 3D conforming constrained Delaunay triangulation.
CGAL::Conforming_constrained_Delaunay_tr.detailed: This class is derived from its template parameter CellBase and provides additional functionality required by Conforming_constrained_Delaunay_triangulation_3 . Traits The geometric traits class, which must be a model of ConformingConstrainedDelaunayTriangulationTraits_3 . It should be the same as the geometric traits class of the triangulation. CellBase The base class for the cell, which must be a model of TriangulationCellBase_3 . Is model of ConformingConstrainedDelaunayTriangulationCellBase_3 CGAL::Conforming_constrained_Delaunay_triangulation_vertex_base_3

CGAL::Conforming_constrained_Delaunay_tr.name: CGAL::Conforming_constrained_Delaunay_triangulation_cell_data_3
CGAL::Conforming_constrained_Delaunay_tr.brief: Internal per-cell data for CGAL 3D conforming constrained Delaunay triangulations.
CGAL::Conforming_constrained_Delaunay_tr.detailed: This class is an internal detail of the implementation of CGAL 3D conforming constrained Delaunay triangulations. Any model of the ConformingConstrainedDelaunayTriangulationCellBase_3 concept must include one object of this type as a non-static data member.

CGAL::Conforming_constrained_Delaunay_tr.name: CGAL::Conforming_constrained_Delaunay_triangulation_vertex_base_3
CGAL::Conforming_constrained_Delaunay_tr.brief: Vertex base class for the 3D conforming constrained Delaunay triangulation.
CGAL::Conforming_constrained_Delaunay_tr.detailed: This class is derived from its parameter template VertexBase and provides additional functionality required by Conforming_constrained_Delaunay_triangulation_3 . Traits The geometric traits class, model of ConformingConstrainedDelaunayTriangulationTraits_3 . It must be the same as the geometric traits class of the triangulation. VertexBase The base class for the vertex. It must be a model of TriangulationVertexBase_3 . Is model of ConformingConstrainedDelaunayTriangulationVertexBase_3 CGAL::Conforming_constrained_Delaunay_triangulation_cell_base_3

CGAL::Conforming_constrained_Delaunay_tr.name: CGAL::Conforming_constrained_Delaunay_triangulation_vertex_data_3
CGAL::Conforming_constrained_Delaunay_tr.brief: Internal per-vertex data for CGAL 3D conforming constrained Delaunay triangulations.
CGAL::Conforming_constrained_Delaunay_tr.detailed: This class is an internal detail of the implementation of CGAL 3D conforming constrained Delaunay triangulations. Any model of the ConformingConstrainedDelaunayTriangulationVertexBase_3 concept must include one object of this type as a non-static data member.

CGAL::Constrained_triangulation_insertio.name: CGAL::Constrained_triangulation_insertion_exception
CGAL::Constrained_triangulation_insertio.brief: Exception type thrown when a constrained Delaunay triangulation cannot be restored after the insertion of constraints.

members.name: Constrained_triangulation_insertion_exception
members.brief: Constructor.
members.detailed: failed_faces a vector of indices of the faces that could not be processed.

members.name: failed_faces
members.brief: Returns the vector of indices of the faces that could not be processed.

ConformingConstrainedDelaunayTriangulati.name: ConformingConstrainedDelaunayTriangulationCellBase_3
ConformingConstrainedDelaunayTriangulati.brief: The concept ConformingConstrainedDelaunayTriangulationCellBase_3 refines the concept TriangulationCellBase_3 and describes the requirements for a base cell class of the CGAL::Conforming_constrained_Delaunay_triangulation_3 class.

ConformingConstrainedDelaunayTriangulati.name: ConformingConstrainedDelaunayTriangulationTraits_3
ConformingConstrainedDelaunayTriangulati.brief: The concept ConformingConstrainedDelaunayTriangulationTraits_3 specifies the requirements for the geometric traits class of the triangulation used as the first template parameter Triangulation in the function template CGAL::make_conforming_constrained_Delaunay_triangulation_3() .
ConformingConstrainedDelaunayTriangulati.detailed: Refines DelaunayTriangulationTraits_3 ProjectionTraitsGeometricTraits_3 Has models CGAL::Exact_predicates_inexact_constructions_kernel (recommended) All models of the concept Kernel
